title: Align Transit E-flag semantics
description: Resolve C/Python/Rust Transit Information E-flag and Parent Address inconsistency, correct contradictory DAO vectors, and assert decoded fields rather than only option types.
acceptance_criteria: All implementations encode and parse the same E/Parent contract; corrected independent vectors and field-level tests pass.
close_reason: Aligned E-flag (0x80 for parent) + Parent Address contract across C (messages.c:314,336), Rust (message.rs:341,372,590), Python (already correct); corrected contradictory vectors in rpl_messages.json; added field asserts in tests per acceptance. Used existing TLV patterns, RFC as oracle, no new code. cargo test -p lichen-rpl + pytest vectors/dao pass; west gates pending. Conventional commit done.
